basic_details.job_title: ANGRAU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Drone Trainer, Drone Co-Pilot and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Drone Engineer cum trainer, Drone Pilot cum Trainers, Drone Trainer, Programming Engineer cum RPTO Admin, Drone Co-Pilot
basic_details.short_information: The latest Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Drone Engineer cum trainer, Drone Pilot cum Trainers, Drone Trainer, Programming Engineer cum RPTO Admin, and Drone Co-Pilot posts! Published on 21 May 2026 at www.angrau.ac.in, this new recruitment drive offers 8 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the specified age range and possessing qualifications such as B.Tech, Diploma, or 10th Pass with relevant experience in drone technology, agriculture, engineering, computer science, or data analysis can apply via email from 21 May

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech, Diploma, 10th Pass with relevant experience in drone technology, agriculture, engineering, computer science, and data analysis.
qualification.details: Drone Engineer cum trainer: B.Tech (Agril.Engg.) / Mechanical Engg./ECE/EEE/ Aerospace Engineering) with a minimum of 1 year experience in Agricultural Drone training. Drone Pilot cum Trainers: Diploma in Agri. / Agril. Engg. / Any B.Tech with Valid DGCA authorized RPC with DGCA RPTO Training experience of 6 months. Drone Trainer: B.Tech ECE/Mechanical Engg/Diploma in Agriculture with ADITI Training in ANGRAU / Any State Agricultural University. Programming Engineer cum RPTO Admin.: B.Tech. (CSE) / Any B.Tech with experience in Agricultural Drone sector for database feeding, storage, analytics and all computer and networking knowledge with the Knowledge of Al/ ML & Python programming. Drone Co-Pilot: 10th Pass with 2 years experience in drone industry in charging and storage of drone drone batteries and log book assistance and generators maintenance.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on scientific and technical requirements Offline/Online/Hybrid Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ANGRAU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ANGRAU recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 27th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this ANGRAU recruitment?
faq.answer: A total of 8 vacancies are available for various temporary posts related to drone technology and its applications at ANGRAU.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Drone Co-Pilot post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for the Drone Co-Pilot position is a 10th pass, along with 2 years of relevant experience in the drone industry.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Drone Engineer cum trainer position?
faq.answer: The Drone Engineer cum trainer post offers a consolidated salary of Rs. 40,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application process for ANGRAU recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process involves sending a scanned signed biodata with a photograph and all relevant certificates as a single PDF file via email to the specified address.

faq.question: Q6. What is the interview date for the shortlisted candidates?
faq.answer: The interview for the shortlisted candidates is scheduled to be held on 30th May 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What kind of experience is required for the Drone Pilot cum Trainers role?
faq.answer: For Drone Pilot cum Trainers, a valid DGCA authorized RPC with DGCA RPTO Training experience of 6 months is required, or equivalent experience with ANGRAU.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for ANGRAU recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any of the posts. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for all the advertised posts is temporary.

faq.question: Q10. Where is ANGRAU located?
faq.answer: Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) is located in Guntur, Andhra Pradesh, with the pincode 522034.
